onboarding.title: How do you want to run Vela?
onboarding.subtitle: You can change this anytime in settings.

local.title: Secure & Local
local.requires: Requires: Ollama + qwen2.5:7b (~5 GB), min. 8 GB RAM
local.ready: ✓ Your device is ready ({{ram}} GB RAM, Ollama active)
local.lowRam: ⚠ Low RAM ({{ram}} GB) – will be slow
local.noOllama: ⚠ Ollama not found – will be installed in setup

cloud.title: Cloud-Connected
cloud.warning: ⚠ Data will be sent to external servers
cloud.requires: Requires: API key (Claude, GPT-4o or Gemini)
cloud.note: → You decide what data to share

cloudWarning.title: Pause for a moment
cloudWarning.heading: What does Cloud mode mean?
points: Your messages are sent to external AI providers (e.g. Anthropic, OpenAI)
These providers process your requests on their servers
Depending on provider and plan, data may be used for training
Handle confidential information carefully in Cloud mode
cloudWarning.note: You can switch to local mode anytime. Vela will show this warning again when you switch back to Cloud.
cloudWarning.confirm: I understand the consequences and consciously choose Cloud mode

trust.title: How much autonomy should Vela have?

cautious.label: Cautious
cautious.description: Vela asks for confirmation with every action. Safe but slightly slower. Ideal for getting started.

balanced.label: Balanced
balanced.description: Vela decides on its own for simple tasks, asks for important actions.

autonomous.label: Autonomous
autonomous.description: Vela acts independently and informs you afterwards. Maximum efficiency.

cli.startServer: Start with: cd packages/server && pnpm dev
cli.provider: Provider: {{provider}} · Type "exit" or Ctrl+C to quit

models.noModels: No models installed. Install with: ollama pull qwen2.5:7b
